{
  "mission": "master the NATO phonetic alphabet",
  "name": "learn the letters",
  "topics": [{"path": "a", "kind": "recall", "summary": "remember each letter sound"}, {"path": "b", "kind": "skill", "summary": "say letters aloud fast"}, {"path": "c", "kind": "recall", "summary": "match letters to words"}, {"path": "d", "kind": "skill", "summary": "write letters correctly"}, {"path": "e", "kind": "recall", "summary": "name the alphabet order"}],
  "phases": [
    {"topics": ["a"], "criteria": {"min_attempts": 5, "min_accuracy": 0.6}, "focus": "build foundational recall"}},
    {"topics": ["b"], "criteria": {"min_attempts": 5, "min_accuracy": 0.6}, "focus": "connect sounds to letters"}},
    {"topics": ["c"], "criteria": {"min_attempts": 5, "min_accuracy": 0.6}, "focus": "reinforce spelling patterns"}},
    {"topics": ["d"], "criteria": {"min_attempts": 5, "min_accuracy": 0.6}, "focus": "practice writing sequence"},
    {"topics": ["e"], "criteria": {"min_attempts": 5, "min_accuracy": 0.6}, "focus": "test speed and accuracy"}
  ],
  "refinement_questions": [
    "what sounds match these letters?",
    "how does order affect pronunciation?",
    "can you name the alphabet in a sentence?"
  ]
}

raw:
{
  "insight_updates": [
    {"op": "update", "id": "att_1", "key": "revised insight", "text": "The p-value shows strong evidence against the null; update wording to reflect confidence."},
    {"op": "update", "id": "att_2", "key": "resolved insight", "text": "Three successes on this pattern resolved it; no new failures → mark as resolved."},
    {"op": "update", "id": "att_3", "key": "clarify misconception", "text": "Slow successes indicate effort, not failure; focus on consistent accuracy."},
    {"op": "update", "id": "att_4", "key": "adjust difficulty", "text": "Accuracy below 0.50 suggests lowering difficulty; above 0.85 raises it."},
    {"op": "update", "id": "att_5", "key": "prior neglect note", "text": "Prior accuracy matters; test sensitivity affects interpretation."},
    {"op": "update", "id": "att_6", "key": "posterior explanation", "text": "Likelihood supports updated belief; posterior shifted meaningfully."},
    {"op": "update", "id": "att_7", "key": "retain evidence", "text": "Data supports change; cite attempt ids for audit."}
  ],
  "strategy": "intermediate",
  "plan_revision": null,
  "questions": [],
  "topic_retirements": [],
  "journal": "2-4 sentences: what this cycle showed and what to watch next"
}
